'''Charbi City Spaceport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]]. It was the location of the meeting between [[Cal Omas]] and [[Dur Gejjen]]. Gejjen was later [[Mission to Vulpter|assassinated]] by [[Ben Skywalker]] on behalf of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Lon Shevu]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Jori Lekauf]] also spyed on the meeting, and the information they captured allowed [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to arrest Omas. After the assassination, everyone inside the spaceport was searched. This lead to a showdown between Lekauf and the police outside the spaceport, where Lekauf killed himself by destroying his shuttle.

{{Loc-stub}}
